description: Invert the admin-role registration guard so valid customer registration is rejected.
Return a false success path when password validation fails.
Require cart totals to strictly exceed the supplier minimum instead of meeting it.
Stop defaulting the suggestion limit when the input value is zero.
Return nil rather than an explicit empty suggestion list for blank input.
Allow unauthorized suppliers while rejecting the rightful owner.
Break the only valid supplier transition from Pending to InProgress.
